rest_crud.name: REST CRUD Microservice
rest_crud.description: Standard CRUD microservice with REST API, schema validation, and persistent storage.
task_templates: Set up FastAPI application with database connection
Define SQLAlchemy models with strict schema validation
Implement Pydantic schemas for request/response validation
Implement CRUD router endpoints (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Write comprehensive pytest test suite
Add error handling and input validation middleware
Create Dockerfile and docker-compose configuration

rules_engine.name: Dynamic Business Rules Engine
rules_engine.description: Configurable rule engine for complex business logic with expression evaluation.

default_stack.storage: JSON rule files + SQLite audit log

task_templates: Design rule schema and JSON rule file format
Implement rule parser with condition/action AST
Build expression evaluator with operator support
Implement rule execution context and variable binding
Create API endpoints for rule CRUD and evaluation
Add comprehensive test cases covering edge cases
Implement audit logging for rule evaluations

api_integration.name: Third-Party API Integration Service
api_integration.description: Async service integrating with external APIs with robust error handling and retries.
task_templates: Set up async FastAPI application with lifespan
Implement base HTTP client with httpx and timeout config
Add retry logic with exponential backoff using tenacity
Implement response caching with TTL
Build error handling: 4xx, 5xx, network failures, timeouts
Create integration router with webhook support
Write async tests with mocked external API responses

auth_service.name: OAuth2 + JWT Authentication Service with RBAC
auth_service.description: Full authentication service with OAuth2 flows, JWT tokens, and role-based access control.
task_templates: Set up FastAPI with async PostgreSQL and Alembic migrations
Implement User and Role models with many-to-many relationship
Build JWT token creation, validation, and refresh logic
Implement OAuth2 password flow with bcrypt hashing
Create RBAC dependency injection system
Implement user registration, login, and token refresh endpoints
Add admin endpoints with role management
Write comprehensive auth and RBAC test suite

mongo_join_engine.name: MongoDB SQL-Style Join Engine with Change Streams
mongo_join_engine.description: Implements Inner, Left, Right, Full Outer joins on MongoDB with historical sync and live Change Streams.
task_templates: Set up async FastAPI with Motor MongoDB client
Implement INNER JOIN using $lookup aggregation pipeline
Implement LEFT JOIN with null preservation
Implement RIGHT JOIN via collection swap + null preservation
Implement FULL OUTER JOIN by combining left + right with deduplication
Build historical data sync with batch processing and checkpointing
Implement Change Stream listener for live data updates
Create query API with join type selection and field projection
Write comprehensive join correctness test suite
